THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE PROPERTY WHICH WAS THE SUBJECT OF THIS LITIGATION HAS BEEN SOLD. 2. PROCEEDS OF THE SALE ARE HELD IN ESCROW AT OLD REPUBLIC TITLE COMPNY ESCROW NO. 420947-IHD. 3. THE COURT ORDERS AS FOLLOWS: 1. ESCROW AGENT IS ORDERED TO PAY FUNDS HELD AS FOLLOWS:1. TO REGINA M. MURRAY, $5,063.25 AS ATTORNEY FEES AND $1,249.23 AS COST. ANY AND ALL INTEREST ACCRUED SINCE THE DATE OF THE CLOSE OF ESCROW UNTIL PAYOUT OF THE FUNDS SHOULD BE DIVIDED EQUALLY BETWEEN REGINA M. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On November 5,2002.
Off Calendar Nov-05-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar this day for hearing on Action for Partition: Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia L. Van Steenberge.
John J. Murray, Esq. represented the plaintiff. Regina M. Posey was sworn and examined. The following exhibits were marked for identification: 1) Escrow statement; 2) Division of Escrow Funds; 3) Surcharges - detailed re: Exhibit 2; 4) Cost List and 5) Attorney's timesheet. The Court takes evidence and good cause appearing orders the escrow agent to pay out the funds held in escrow as follows: 1) To Regina M. Posey the sum of $96,408.96; 2) To Regina M. Oisey, Administrator of the Estate of Basilisa Arcilias Mandiola aka Basilisa Mendiola the sum of $92,231.18; To Rossana Mendiola Usi the sum of $765.76; to John M. Murray the sum of $5,063.25 as attorney fees and $1,249.23 as costs. Any and all interest accrued since the date of close of escrow until payout of the funds should be divided equally between Regina M. Posey, Regina M. Posey, Administrator of the Estate of Basilisa Arcilias Mendiola aka Basilisa Mendiola and Rossana Mendiola Usi. Order signed in open Court.
